# Feature 003: Superpowers Integration

## Status

Draft.

## Dates

- Spec created: 2026-06-18
- Renumbered under Phase 2 teaching platform: 2026-06-18

## Artifacts

- `spec.md`: Product and technical design for the first ecosystem integration.
- `plan.md`: To be created after spec review.
- `tasks.md`: To be created after implementation planning.

## Feature Goal

Provide a Web-guided and backend-backed one-click flow for installing and
verifying Superpowers, then show available and loaded Superpowers skills in the
teaching sidebar and exported lesson reports.
